Analyzer

Select or create a story to begin.

Log
New Story

The _analysis/ folder will be created inside this folder automatically.

Settings

Settings are saved locally on your Mac and never transmitted anywhere except to your chosen provider.

Used for Amazon book data (category stats, competition analysis, keyword research). Get a free key at canopyapi.co.

Import the WinningCat Amazon category dataset to populate the KDP category map with real, ID-backed paths for Books and Kindle Store. Existing verified entries are never downgraded.
